🌿 Nature

The Iberian lynx is back from the brink of extinction

Once down to fewer than a hundred animals, the world's rarest wild cat has multiplied more than twentyfold and is no longer endangered.

🌿 Nature · July 7, 2026 · 1 min read

Deforestation in the Amazon has fallen sharply

Satellite monitoring shows forest loss in the Brazilian Amazon dropping steeply since 2023 — the rainforest is getting room to breathe.

🌿 Nature · July 5, 2026 · 1 min read

The Good Globe exists for one reason: to prove that good things happen everywhere, every single day. No doom. No fear. Only good.
